title: Smoke-Cold Syrian Grapes Kibbeh
description: A refreshing, post-workout dish featuring crisp, smoky flavors of smoked lamb and sweet Syrian grapes. Perfect for warm days when a cold snack is desired. No onions or garlic involved.
instructions: Combine lamb, grapes, 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/8 teaspoon black pepper in a large bowl until well mixed.
Add 1/4 cup chopped fresh parsley and 1/4 cup chopped fresh mint to the bowl and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for an additional 30 minutes to chill thoroughly.
